hero.thesis: Become a sought-after ESL tutor on Cambly and Preply, leveraging your language skills to earn $15-$30/hr by booking solid evening and weekend sessions.
hero.marketSize: The global ESL market is projected to reach $49.93 billion by 2025, with a growing demand for online tutoring services.
hero.payingEvidence: Cambly and Preply both report increasing demand for ESL tutors, with top tutors earning upwards of $2,000 monthly.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation Setup

actions.action: Create your tutor profiles on Cambly and Preply with a compelling bio and professional photo.
actions.success: Profiles are approved and live on both platforms.

actions.action: Research top-performing ESL tutors on both platforms; note their profiles and reviews.
actions.success: Identify 3 key strategies used by top tutors.

actions.action: Record a short video introduction for your profile that highlights your teaching style and language expertise.
actions.success: Video is uploaded and visible on your profiles.

ninetyDay.metric: Profiles active and optimized on Cambly and Preply.

actions.action: Join ESL tutor forums like ESLBase and Reddit's r/OnlineESLTeaching.
actions.success: Engage in 2 discussions on each platform.

actions.action: Contact 5 potential students through Preply's platform using personalized messages.
actions.success: Receive at least 1 positive response.

actions.action: Set up a booking calendar using Calendly to streamline scheduling with students.
actions.success: Calendly link integrated into both profiles.

ninetyDay.title: Refine and Improve

actions.action: Gather feedback from initial students and refine your teaching methods.
actions.success: Implement at least 2 improvements based on feedback.

actions.action: Research ESL teaching resources on TeachersPayTeachers and integrate new materials.
actions.success: Incorporate 3 new resources into your lessons.

actions.action: Ask students for reviews on both platforms after completed sessions.
actions.success: Receive 2 new reviews.

ninetyDay.metric: At least 2 positive reviews added to profiles.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Your Reach

actions.action: Create a LinkedIn post about your ESL tutoring services and share your Calendly link.
actions.success: Post receives at least 5 interactions.

actions.action: Reach out to 5 local ESL groups on Facebook and offer a free trial lesson.
actions.success: Secure 1 new student from outreach.

actions.action: Optimize your profiles based on student feedback and new insights.
actions.success: Improved profiles are published.

ninetyDay.metric: Secure 2 additional students from expanded outreach.

ninetyDay.title: Solidify Your Schedule

actions.action: Finalize a consistent tutoring schedule that maximizes evenings and weekends.
actions.success: Schedule is fully booked for the next 2 weeks.

actions.action: Launch a referral program offering discounts for student referrals.
actions.success: Referral details added to outgoing communications.

actions.action: Follow up with past students for feedback and potential referrals.
actions.success: Receive feedback from at least 2 past students.

ninetyDay.metric: Achieve at least 10 booked hours per week.

ninetyDay.title: Enhance Your Offerings

actions.action: Develop a specialized ESL course for specific niches (e.g., business or travel English).
actions.success: Course outline completed.

actions.action: Promote your new course offering on ESL forums and LinkedIn.
actions.success: Generate interest from at least 2 potential students.

actions.action: Offer a free introductory lesson for the new course to attract new students.
actions.success: Secure 1 new student for the course.

ninetyDay.metric: Enroll 2 students into your specialized course.

ninetyDay.title: Optimize for Growth

actions.action: Analyze your student feedback and adjust your offerings accordingly.
actions.success: Implement 2 changes based on feedback.

actions.action: Set up a feedback request automation using ConvertKit.
actions.success: Automated feedback request sent after each session.

actions.action: Update your profiles to reflect new skills and courses offered.
actions.success: Profiles are up-to-date and showcase all offerings.

ninetyDay.metric: Receive consistent feedback from 80% of students.

ninetyDay.title: Build Your Brand

actions.action: Create a simple website using Webflow to showcase your tutoring services.
actions.success: Website is live with links to your profiles and Calendly.

actions.action: Write a blog post on ESL learning tips and share it on LinkedIn and ESL forums.
actions.success: Post receives at least 5 interactions.

actions.action: Collect testimonials from students and add them to your website.
actions.success: At least 3 testimonials live on the website.

ninetyDay.metric: Website receives at least 50 visits in the first week.

ninetyDay.title: Refine and Scale

actions.action: Evaluate your pricing strategy and adjust based on demand and feedback.
actions.success: New pricing structure implemented.

actions.action: Reach out to past students for testimonials to boost credibility.
actions.success: Secure at least 2 new testimonials.

actions.action: Plan a webinar on ESL tutoring techniques and promote it to your network.
actions.success: Attract at least 5 attendees to the webinar.

ninetyDay.metric: Increase in student inquiries and bookings.

actions.action: Create templates for lesson plans and communications to save time.
actions.success: Templates ready for use in future sessions.

actions.action: Automate follow-ups and reminders using ConvertKit.
actions.success: Automation fully set up for all students.

actions.action: Review and streamline your scheduling process to reduce booking conflicts.
actions.success: No booking conflicts in the next two weeks.

actions.action: Analyze your income and bookings over the last 10 weeks.
actions.success: Identify trends and areas for improvement.

actions.action: Adjust your marketing strategy based on the analysis.
actions.success: New marketing plan ready to implement.

actions.action: Reconnect with network for new opportunities and collaborations.
actions.success: Secure at least 1 new collaboration or opportunity.

ninetyDay.title: Prepare for Long-Term Success

actions.action: Set goals for the next quarter based on current progress.
actions.success: Clear, actionable goals set for the next 3 months.

actions.action: Explore expanding into new platforms or services.
actions.success: Identify at least 1 new platform to explore.

actions.action: Reflect on personal growth and challenges faced during this journey.
actions.success: Document reflections for future reference.

ninetyDay.metric: Ready to implement new strategies for continued growth.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.why: Streamlines scheduling with students across different time zones.
toolStack.pricing: Free for basic use, $8/month for premium features.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Automates communication and feedback requests with students.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Allows for easy creation of a professional website to showcase services.
toolStack.pricing: Free for basic use, $12/month for custom domain.

toolStack.name: LinkedIn
toolStack.why: Platform to connect with potential students and share content.
toolStack.pricing: Free with premium options starting at $29.99/month.

toolStack.name: TeachersPayTeachers
toolStack.why: Source for ESL teaching resources to enhance lesson quality.
toolStack.pricing: Free account with paid resource options.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: [Name], interested in mastering English?

Hi [Name],

I’m [Your Name], an experienced ESL tutor on [Platform]. I specialize in [Niche] and have helped students like you achieve [specific outcome]. Are you interested in a trial lesson? Let’s discuss how I can help you achieve your language goals.

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial message, follow-up after 3 days, final follow-up after 7 days.

pricing.starter: $15 per hour for basic conversational English sessions.
pricing.growth: $20 per hour for specialized courses (e.g., business English).
pricing.premium: $30 per hour for intensive, personalized tutoring packages.
pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices after every 50 hours of tutoring or consistent full bookings for 3 months.

failureModes: Profile Stagnation: Failing to regularly update and optimize your tutor profiles.
Feedback Ignorance: Not implementing student feedback can stagnate growth.
Platform Dependency: Over-reliance on one platform limits potential client base.
Pricing Missteps: Incorrect pricing can deter potential students.
Schedule Overload: Poor scheduling can lead to burnout and missed sessions.
Lack of Differentiation: Blending in with countless other tutors limits bookings.
Poor Communication: Failing to follow up or confirm sessions leads to client loss.
Missed Marketing: Not leveraging all available digital marketing channels limits reach.

setup.llc: Not necessary unless scaling to a larger business or hiring other tutors.
setup.payments: Use Preply and Cambly's built-in payment systems for simplicity.
setup.contracts: Rely on platform terms of service; optional for direct clients.

scaling: To transition from solo operation to a small team, start by identifying other talented ESL tutors who complement your teaching style. Use platforms like LinkedIn and ESL forums to network and recruit potential team members. Develop a consistent training program to ensure uniformity in teaching quality across your team. Implement a revenue-sharing model or fixed hourly rate for your team members, and use tools like Trello or Notion to coordinate schedules and lesson plans. As you grow, consider investing in a more sophisticated CRM system to manage client relationships and streamline communications. Focus on building a brand reputation for quality and reliability to attract both students and high-caliber tutors.
